bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingThe M6800D from AudioControlPosted on April 30, 2025The M6800D from AudioControlIf you‚Äôve ever wondered how to enjoy consistent, high-fidelity sound across your entire home‚Äîfrom the living room to the patio‚Äîthe AudioControl M6800D offers a powerful answer.This 16-channel amplifier can manage up to eight separate zones of audio, delivering rich, room-filling power with the kind of control and clarity most amplifiers can‚Äôt match.‚Äç‚ÄçBuilt for the Modern HomeWith 100 watts of power per channel at 8 ohms‚Äîand up to 200 watts at 4 ohms‚Äîthe M6800D can drive an impressive range of speakers, including large in-wall systems like the James Loudspeaker QX620 or Triad‚Äôs Gold Series, even when installed in outdoor or high-ceiling spaces. When paired with the right speakers, you‚Äôll hear every detail from your favorite playlists, whether you're hosting in the kitchen or relaxing outside.It‚Äôs not just about power, though. This amplifier includes an onboard digital signal processor that allows each room‚Äîor zone‚Äîto be tuned independently. That means your kitchen audio can be crisp and bright while your theater room delivers deep, cinematic bass.‚Äç‚ÄçMore Than an AmplifierThe M6800D is more than just amplification. It includes matrix switching that lets you send any audio source to any room in the house. Whether it‚Äôs a streaming playlist, a turntable, or the audio from your TV, you can route the sound to one or multiple zones with zero loss in quality.Thanks to its built-in Dante audio networking, you‚Äôre not limited by wiring. Digital audio can be distributed over your home‚Äôs Ethernet network, enabling clean installations and future-ready flexibility. For homeowners with large spaces or plans to expand, that level of scalability becomes a real advantage.‚Äç‚ÄçSmarter Sound ManagementWith the ability to configure equalization, set crossover points, and store speaker profiles from top loudspeaker brands, the M6800D gives you a tailored experience. These profiles help optimize the sound for your exact speakers, reducing guesswork and enhancing clarity. Even if your home has tricky acoustics, the amplifier‚Äôs fine-tuning capabilities adapt the sound to the space.Whether you‚Äôre listening to jazz in the den or powering the backyard with a playlist during a get-together, the amplifier manages it all without compromise.‚Äç‚ÄçQuiet Strength, Seamless IntegrationWhile the technical performance is outstanding, it‚Äôs the seamless integration that makes this amp homeowner-friendly. You don‚Äôt need to touch a rack of equipment every time you want to switch rooms or sources. Instead, everything works behind the scenes. It‚Äôs compatible with popular home automation systems like Control4, Crestron, and Savant‚Äîso if your home already runs on one of these, the M6800D fits right in.‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçIf you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçServices:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‚ÄçProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçEngage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright ¬© 2023.
